calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Tammy Boswell , self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. Sanction on April 16,2024 and June 18, 2024 was vacated by the court. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 29, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

After hearing, self-represented plaintiff filed a dismissal of the complaint. Therefore the OSC is off calendar/dismissal on file.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 27, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To Jun-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 18, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)
